description: Seed replaces advertised heads and then asks again for a view that was only reachable from the withdrawn root set
notes: Session-level negative interop proof for replace=true HEADS invalidating a previously reachable VIEW_ANNOUNCE-advertised object.
The simulator injects a replacing HEADS update plus a stale view WANT before BYE to confirm optional-message reachable state is cleared together with the old root set.
